---
title: "MH4510 Project Test"
author: "Chin Ao-Wen"
output:
  pdf_document: default
  html_document:
    df_print: paged
---

```{r}
install.packages("reticulate")
```

```{r}
library(reticulate)
library(caret)
```


```{r}
np = import("numpy")
```

```{r}
train_data = read.csv("datasets/classical_train.csv")
val_data = read.csv("datasets/classical_val.csv")
#test_data = read.csv("datasets/classical_test.csv")

y_deep_train = np$load("datasets/y_deep_train.npy")
```

```{r}
y_deep_train
```

```{r}
## combine label and features into combined dataset
class()
# convert labels to factors
y_train = as.factor(y_classical_train)
y_val = as.factor(y_classical_val)

# Combine features and labels for training
train_df = data.frame(y = y_train, X_classical_train)
val_df = data.frame(y = y_val, X_classical_val)

train_df
val_df
```


```{r}
ctrl = trainControl(method='cv', number=5)

log_model = train(
  y ~ .,
  data = train_df,
  method = "multinom",
  trControl = ctrl,
  trace = FALSE
)
```

```{r}
log_model
```
